details.reasoning: Implementation is well-designed and functionally complete, but has one notable gap. Strengths: (1) Theme type definition in shared package (ThemeColors, BuiltInTheme, BuiltInThemeId) with all required color properties (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, status bar). (2) Three built-in themes correctly implemented (t3-dark, t3-light, t3-midnight). (3) ThemeProvider component with proper setup in root layout. (4) useTheme hook with localStorage persistence, CSS custom property application via applyColorThemeVars(), and colorTheme/setColorTheme state management. (5) ThemeSelector component with detailed visual previews showing actual theme colors in a simulated UI layout. (6) No build config or dependency changes. Weakness: Rubric specifies 'getTheme and listThemes utility functions in the shared package,' but implementation provides getBuiltInTheme() (not getTheme) and BUILT_IN_THEMES array directly (no listThemes function), both located in apps/web/src/themes.ts rather than packages/contracts. While these utilities function correctly and serve their purpose, they don't match the specified names or location, representing a deviation from requirements.
